transcript: Speaker A: I went from building sedans to building some of the fastest racing cars in the world. Hi, I'm Calum Nicholas, and I've worked on championship-winning teams. I've always loved racing. My life changed when I realised there was a whole world of motorsports beyond just driving. For me, it was studying a specialised motorsport course that gave me a way in. Because this world is not just drivers. It's engineers, mechanics, strategists, people like me. So if you're curious and willing to learn, there's a place in motorsport for you too!
on_screen_text: I went from building sedans to building some of the fastest racing cars in the world. Hi, I'm Calum Nicholas. 13 F1 seasons, 230+ Grands Prix. I've always loved racing. My life changed when I realised there was a whole world of motorsports beyond driving. For me, it was studying a specialised motorsport course that gave me a way in. Because this world is not just the drivers. It's Engineers, Mechanics, strategists, people like me. So if you're curious and willing to learn, There's a place in motorsport for you too! Explore careers in motorsport with duolingo english test. Accepted by 6300+ institutions worldwide.
summary: F1 mechanic Calum Nicholas shares his journey from building sedans to working on championship-winning racing teams. He encourages viewers to explore diverse motorsport careers beyond driving. The ad promotes the Duolingo English Test as a tool to access global education and career opportunities.
